case_title: GRIFFIN, CHARLES VS CASHMAN, EUGENE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRIFFIN, CHARLES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CASHMAN, EUGENE ERIE AUTO-TRUCK REPAIR PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CASHMAN, EUGENE
REQUEST OTO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGEMENT FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,402.00 FILED BY GRIFFIN, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT CASHMAN, EUGENE ERIE AUTO-TRUCK REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
LETTER FROM DEFENDANT TO OPPOSE PLAINTIFF ATTEMPT TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT ON FILE.
PLFT CHARLES GRIFFIN MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FIL ED 4/3/98, DENIED. COPIES MAILED TO BOTH PARTIES.
